title: Smoky Canadian Ribs Tacos
description: A fusion of Canadian and Mexican flavors, these tender ribs are smothered in a rich pistachio-based BBQ sauce and served in a crispy taco shell.
instructions: Remove the membrane from the back of the ribs and season with coarse salt.
Grill the ribs for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the ribs to a baking sheet and roast in the oven at 300°F for 20-25 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine chipotle peppers, roast garlic, pistachio butter, honey, and lime juice in a blender.
Blend the mixture until smooth and set aside.
Once the ribs are done, brush them with the pistachio BBQ sauce and return to the grill for an additional 2-3 minutes per side.
Warm tortillas on the grill or in a dry pan.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of the ribs onto a tortilla and topping with chopped cilantro.
